exploration_notes: The task centers on two files. (1) `fn_to_cli.py` contains the `FnToCLI` class — the core adapter that maps function signatures to argparse CLI arguments. The bugs are in `type_to_argparse()` (missing `list` origin handling for `list[int]`, `list[Path]` etc.) and in `run()` (not returning the function's result). The `is_optional()` method and `__init__` constructor are part of the call chain since optional `list[Path] | None` parameters must first be unwrapped via `is_optional` before reaching t
